ai_profile:
**Down The Rabbit Hole 2026 Festival Profile**  
Taking place from July 3–5, 2026, *Down The Rabbit Hole* promises an exciting and diverse lineup featuring 54 artists from around the globe. With acts hailing from 20 different countries, including the Netherlands, the UK, the US, Ireland, and Japan, the festival offers a truly international experience. Genres span a wide spectrum, from Electronic and Indie Rock to Folk, Hip-Hop, and Disco, reflecting the event’s commitment to eclecticism and musical exploration. Six DJs will also feature prominently, ensuring the dance floors stay alive throughout the weekend.

The festival embraces diversity in its artist lineup, with 13 acts featuring people of color and a blend of male, female, and mixed-gender groups. This inclusivity is echoed in the wide range of musical styles, which includes everything from Baroque Pop and Psychedelic Folk to Afropop and Anatolian Rock. With a strong representation of Electronic (12 artists) and a healthy mix of emerging and established genres, the festival caters to a broad audience, making it a haven for music enthusiasts seeking something unique.

With an average artist rating of 7.78 (based on a highly rated 90.7% of the lineup), attendees can expect high-quality performances. Nearly all performers (96.3%) have their music available on Spotify, making it easy for fans to discover and connect with the lineup ahead of the event. Down The Rabbit Hole 2026 continues its tradition of celebrating both boundary-pushing creativity and global musical diversity, promising an unforgettable weekend for music lovers.
